notes: A little dreamier than paste efforts.
My favorite rock-a-billy influenced folk singer.
A little too lowkey, slightly if dry cleaning was 40% more bedroom pop.
A touch of camp, indie-rock for the girls, and alt-radio bois. But it's vibey.
Reminds me a little of Mon Rovia. Same lane.
One of my top listened to albums of the first 3 months.
It's a bit crass, but girly british punk is a genre I do enjoy.
